name: Joel Tekoniemi
bio: I started my iGEM journey as a naive third year student, ended up doing it twice, and here I am representing the amazing team Stockholm alumni as president of SGEM! Now, my goal is that future Stockholm iGEMers can have the same opportunity that I had, and hopefully an even better one.

name: Daniela Weh
bio: Luckily, I stumbled upon the iGEM infobooth during my master's onboarding. Back then, I had no idea what synthetic biology even was… and now we're organizing workshops about it! As Vice President of SGEM, I want to spark and support similar journeys for others — creating spaces to explore, learn a ton, and meet some truly amazing people along the way.
